sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_vectors (id INT PRIMARY KEY, vec_data ANY);
INSERT INTO test_vectors VALUES (1, vector(1, 2.34, 'A string', NULL));
INSERT INTO test_vectors VALUES (2, vector(NULL, 3.14, 'text', vector(5.6, 'another string')));
SELECT id, DUMP_VEC(vec_data) FROM test_vectors WHERE DUMP_VEC(vec_data) <> 'vector()';
SELECT id, DUMP_VEC(vector(1, 2, 3)) AS vec_string FROM test_vectors WHERE vec_data IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, DUMP_VEC(vec_data) FROM test_vectors WHERE DUMP_VEC(vec_data) <> (SELECT DUMP_VEC(vector(1, 2, 3)));
SELECT id, DUMP_VEC(vector(atof('3.14'), 2)) AS vec_string FROM test_vectors HAVING vec_string <> 'vector(3.14, 2)';
SELECT t1.id FROM test_vectors t1 JOIN test_vectors t2 ON DUMP_VEC(t1.vec_data) <> DUMP_VEC(t2.vec_data) WHERE t1.id <> t2.id;
SELECT id, DUMP_VEC(vec_data) FROM test_vectors GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) <> 0;
